title: API: GET /api/style-profiles/:id (detail + authorization)

task.description: Implement GET /api/style-profiles/:id to return full style profile data. System presets are readable by any authenticated user. Custom profiles are readable only when the row’s userId matches session user id; otherwise return 404.
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated request returns 401 with JSON containing error.code.
Requesting a system preset id as any authenticated user returns 200 with styleProfile.isSystemPreset===true and styleProfile.sampleTexts as an array.
Requesting a custom profile id owned by the caller returns 200 with styleProfile.sampleTexts.length between 3 and 5 inclusive.
Requesting a custom profile id owned by a different user returns 404 with error.code==='NOT_FOUND'.

definition_of_done: Handler never leaks existence of another user’s custom profile (404 instead of 403).
Response uses camelCase and excludes userId field.
